page_content:
Formerly: ARCH451.

ARCH658 Selected Topics in Urban Design (3 Credits)

Selected Topics in Urban Design

Restriction: Must be in a major in ARCH-Architecture Program; and permission of ARCH-Architecture Program.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

ARCH668 Advanced Selected Topics in Architecture (1-4 Credits) Graduate Selected Topics in Architecture.

Restriction: Permission of ARCH-Architecture Program. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

ARCH670 Advanced Computer Applications in Architecture (3 Credits) Advanced use of computer technology in design. Use of digital design processes and conceptual methodologies to study design alternatives and realization. Methods and techniques of digital design representation, simulation, or fabrication to explore and test concepts and integration of digital technologies into the architectural design process.
